description: Style NoteIdeal for running, this pair of shoes from skechers double up as lifestyle shoes. While the soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the mesh upper keeps your feet fresh and clean. The lace-up upper of the shoes will keep your foot firm on the ground while the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when on the run!Product DetailsBlack shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailingPadded and meshed tongue and innerFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with a plastic unit sandwitched between the outsole and midsole on the heel and patterned lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
